column1: Hey Pauline, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Our spring break is from the March 14th to the March 22nd
Nice to meet you too! dope thats the most popular week. which destination were you lookin to book?
Great! We were considering Dominic Republican (Punta Cana) or Mexico (Cancun or Cabo)
Yea all 3 are awesome. I'm personally in Punta Cana every year for break. its a vibe!
how many ppl in your group so far? I'll send info on all 3
Niiiice. Tbh Punta Cana is my ideal destination ahah
And btw thank you for texting me on a Sunday ahah
And perfect. 13 is a solid group which school you all from?
dope we had a good Columbia group last year. you all def know how to party! lol
Ahah I hope we will be as good as the last year group
I believe it! lol. gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Mhhh the sooner the better you know, but there's no rush ahah
I just know that's already a bit late to plan this trip lol
yeaaa just a bit late so we gotta move a little quickly lol
I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
You can send it to this email adress : arrighipauline@gmail.com
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Great, as soon as I receive it I let you know :)
it should have come through by now! maybe try checking your 'All Mail' tab as well
perfect lmk what the group thinks
That's great, let me check this and send it at my friends as well. I will let you know by tomorrow 😊
Hi! I hope you're doing great, I have a question regarding the hotels, are there clubs inside ? And If so, could we access to them ?
Also, I heard about booze cruises, are there any kind of these events included in the package ?
yea most of the resorts have a nightclub inside. theyre not top level nightclubs by any means but they get the job done! you do have access to those with the base package yup
Ok great I see, and alsoI saw that if we take the +$200 package, we have access to 3 sponsored parties and the boat cruise. What are these parties ? Is it outside of the club ?

yea all of those are off resort nightclubs. for example in Punta Cana, its Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, and Maroca nightclub. All are super dope. theres also the booze cruise event. all events come with round trip transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar
Hi Spiffy! It's Pauline, I saw with the rest of the group and everybody is super down for a trip in Punta Cana for 4 days!
First, is it still good for you ? If yes, what are the next steps ?
Okay cool! Let me just make sure we have availability for your dates
Got it, will let you know in a few! Should be good to go
Perfect! Have you any idea when you will know whether it's good ? :)
So that I can tell the others that we're good
looks like were good to go!!
gonna set this up right now and send over
hey so for 13 of you, we're gonna do three rooms of 3, and one room of 4. is that cool?
just emailed over the reservation. I set it up with the room arrangement above and evened out the price so everyone pays the same price. lmk if it came through!
Let me review it in the af and I let you know as soon as it's done :)
Also, ppl in my were asking whether the dates (14th to 18th) are fixed ?
we can tweak. did you want to switch it up?
Actually, I was thinking to propose 2 sets of dates because for some of them the 14th - 18th is not the ideal.
yea we can do that. they just all have to be in the same room
so like, if theres a room of 3, one cnt have different dates than the other 2
all 3 would have to be on the same check out and check in
but we can def split the group up thats no prob

Ohh ok I see, first thanks for the flexibility But actually we want to go there altogether but if there are other options of dates later in that week (for example from 18th to 22nd) that would be great so that I can propose to the group these options
Let me know if I was not really clear ahah
We can do any start date
did we want to do the 18th to 22nd?
Just to make sure, there are availabilities for these 3 sets of dates ?
Ok so sorry it's tough to make everybody agreeing on a specific dates 😂 I am going to propose them 3 sets of dates : 14th - 18th 16th - 20th 18th - 22nd
14-18th yes, 18-22nd yup, whats the third set?
oh sorry I missed that text
It will be the same range of prices ?
just lmk today so I can make that quick swap for y'all on the reservation
Ok thank you for waiting ! I had all the answers and we choose from the 18th to the 22nd Is it still good for switching?
lol all good. yea ill switch that rn
Word that reservation link is all updated now https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/XMGZIPNDDY
y'all able to get secured on this tonight?
Ok that's great thank you, to be fair I think by tonight it will be tough. What is the deadline for the deposit payment ?
What ballpark time tomorrow so yall plan on gettin it in? Just so I can make the note to the ops team. That way they don't close it down
Maybe by the end of the day, not really before. Do you think that we can extend to Saturday ? I'm scared that getting the deposit payment by tonight will be toigh
Like it's tough for everyone or is it just a few ppl? I can possibly extend for those few that need til tomorrow but the rest we should get started on while I still have this price rate
Ok I understand, I send them the link and I try to make them pay as soon as possible!
Hello, ppl from the group have started to pay the deposit. Is everything good on your side ?
hey whats up! sorry I missed this last night
yea everythings lookin good. we got 10 ppl in there tho, is that gonna be everyone?
No actually, we're still supposed to be 13, I'm going to resend them a reminder so
Also good new ! most of the ppl are down to purchase the $200 package that you mentioned last time :) How could we do that ?
Yea cool if you can get those others in soon as possible. That room will be gone by the end of today without deposits
Ok, I send them a final reminder 😂
Also, do you have any ideas if we can purchase the "party package" as we discussed last time ?

Lol. yea for sure. I can add that right into your accounts. did you want to do the $200 event bundle? thatll be 3 events. so you can choose from Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, Maroca, and the Booze Cruise event
My personal recommendation, if youre only gonna choose 3, is Imagine, Coco, and Booze Cruise
Maroca is dope too, but if I had to choose
let me know if you want those 3 added in

Ok ok, I am going to send them the names of the 3 clubs and the booze cruise. And yes, we actually want to do the $200 bundle I'd just like to know, does it include an open bar ? And by then do we have to pay the 200$ ? thank you :)
yea it does include open bar!

just let me know which ones we wanna do and I'll get those added in. you have a little time to make the final 200 payment for the party pass but I would do it sooner than later for sure so that we can complete your pre departure process
Ok ok I get it, do we have to choose the parties and the clubs we want rn or we can pay and choose them later c
yea you'll choose the events you want as we add it in now
theres 4 event options. Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, Maroca Nightclub, and the Booze Cruise
all open bar, transportation included, etc. I'd def recommend Imagine, Coco, and booze cruise
Ok perfect, so yes you can add it rn And by the end of the weekend I can let you know on the places that we have chosen
got it, it may be easiest to wait til the weekend when you know. just because I have to add each individual event
Oh ok ok I get it
hey! do we know if that person wants to be added?
hey when you have a min if you could have everyone upload their flights, so we can set up your airport transfers!
Hey ! Ok no problem I am going to text them
Btw, 2 ppl of the group are leaving before (they are still paying the whole thing ofc) Is it possible to organize the airport transports for them even if they are leaving before ?
yea for sure! did they enter their flight info in? our ops team will see their early departure and have things ready
Not yet! I will let them know ! Thanks :)
Hey! I hope you're doing well So there are the choices for the party package and the date :
We would like to do the booze cruise of Thursday 19 We also follow your recs and we would like to go to Imagine Cave and Coco Bongo on Thursday 19 night and Friday 20 night. What do you think ?

hey hey, yea so there are specific dates your week that those venues are available. its typically one location per night. heres what I have at the moment for the sched. I'll find out asap which night will be Imagine Wednesday March 18 - Coco Bongo Thursday March 19 - Maroca Nightclub Friday March 20 - Booze Cruise Right now assuming Imagine will be avail the night of the 20th but I will double confirm
Hey! Thank you for reaching me back, so we will go with the Maroca Nightclub on Thursday 19th, the booze cruise on Friday 20th and Imagine on Friday 20th (if it's actually available)! 😊
Awesome. I'll get those added to your accounts, will wait on adding Imagine Cave until we confirm
Do all 13 of you want the addition?
Yes all 13 of us want this addition!
Ok perfect, let me know for Cave And also, I told ppl to add their flights so that you can organize the transportation!
Hello Spiffy! How're you doing ? To you have any new about Imagine Cave ? :)
I get there later on today and will have more info on the best route
Ok perfect let me know when you have an answer ?
Hey hey. Lookin like we can make Imagine work for Saturday while you're here
Want me to add that in to the package?
Heyyy! Unfortunately, some of the people are not here on Saturday night that why we wanted to go out on Thursday Night and Friday night :)
Is there any party organized on Friday night ?
we could potentially do Friday, I'll ask!
Ok thanks, do you know when you could have an answer ?
Ok thanks, do you know when you could have an answer ?
hi Pauline! still waiting to find out about the Friday
Actually I spoke to the team at the desk and they said itll be best to come by the desk when you all arrive to see what we can do for Fri
hey also side note we just need Stefano to pay off his balance. and then Stef and Krish we need their flight info
hey Pauline checking in again. is Stefano still doing the party pass with everyone?
